affected_pattern: Enterprise accounts under consolidated billing show $0 for one of several child accounts
root_cause: Hierarchy-resolver bug in consolidated billing — a parent account's charge-aggregation query skipped child accounts whose ledger had been touched by a pending credit note, leaving those children at $0 on the consolidated invoice.
supporting_evidence: Zero-Billing RCA Playbook: Consolidated Billing Hierarchy Defect pattern
All affected child accounts have an open credit_note row with status=pending
SQL in consolidated-invoice job filters out rows where credit_note_pending IS NOT NULL
recommended_action: Regenerate consolidated invoices including the skipped children
Issue supplementary invoice for the missed charges
Fix the aggregation SQL to include pending credit notes as separate line items
Add a regression test covering parent-child with pending credits
